scripts.build:static: powershell -Command "$env:NEXT_PUBLIC_STATIC_EXPORT='true'; if (Test-Path 'src/app/api') { Move-Item 'src/app/api' 'temp_api' -Force }; if (Test-Path '.next') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.next' }; npx next build; if (Test-Path 'temp_api') { Move-Item 'temp_api' 'src/app/api' -Force }; if (Test-Path 'build') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'build' }; if (Test-Path 'out/index.html') { Copy-Item 'out/index.html' 'out/404.html' -Force }; if (Test-Path 'out') { Rename-Item 'out' 'build' }"
